title: $applproperties
text: $applproperties Set the presentation properties of the application shell. $applproperties ( { PropertyList } ) = PropertyValuesList Example: $applproperties("backimage") = "backimage=@logo.jpg" Parameters Table 1. Parameters Parameter Data Type Description PropertiesList String Associative list of application shell properties PropertyValuesList String Associative list of application shell properties and their values Table 2. Properties set by $applproperties Property Technical Name Description Background Color (BackColor) BackColor Background color of the window. Background Image (BackImage) BackImage Background image of the window. Horizontal Alignment (Halign) HAlign Horizontal alignment of the background image. Horizontal Scaling ( Hscale) HScale Horizontal scaling of the background image. Vertical Alignment ( Valign) VAlign Vertical alignment of background image. Vertical Scaling ( Vscale) VScale Vertical scaling of background image. Preserve Aspect Ratio ( PreserveAspect) PreserveAspect Specify whether to preserve the aspect ratio of the background image at all times. Message Line MessageLine Show or hide the message line at the bottom of the application window. state state The application shell window states: NORMAL (default) MAXIMIZED MINIMIZED Left (xpos) XPos The left (horizontal) window position, relative to primary Windows desktop. Top (ypos) YPos The top (vertical) window position, relative to the primary Windows desktop. Width (xsize) XSize The width of the application shell window. Height (ysize) YSize The height of the application shell window. XPosPerc The horizontal application shell window position, as a percentage relative to the relative to the primary Windows desktop. YPosPerc The vertical window position, as a percentage relative to the relative to the primary Windows desktop. XSizePerc The horizontal window size, as a percentage as a percentage relative to the relative to the primary Windows desktop. YSizePerc The vertical window size, as a percentage relative to the relative to the primary Windows desktop. Return Values Table 3. Values of $procerror Commonly Returned Following $applproperties Value Error constant Meaning -1110 UPROCERR_TOPIC Topic name not known. Invalid property specified. Use Use only in Application Shell and Form components. Description Property values set using $applproperties override those set in the initialization file with the Shell definition, or values set in the application shell definition. Example: Using $applproperties vProps = "" putitem/id vProps, "backimage","@logo.png" putitem/id vProps, "PreserveAspect","true" $applproperties() = vProps Copy Related Links $applname Return the name of the Application Shell. $appltitle Return or set the window title bar text of a Uniface Windows application. Shell Sets the default window properties of the application shell. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
